title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on how AGI will reshape economic distribution. They explore optimal taxation of AI-generated wealth, whether developing nations can capture AI gains, and whether inequality is inevitable or manageable through policy design.
